title: my soul = my life = my glory
author: joshualinog
excerpt: Psalms 7:5 LEB let the enemy of my soul pursue, and overtake and trample my life into the ground, and lay my honor in the dust. Selah HB2 7:6 יִרַדֹּף אוֹיֵב נַפְשִׁי וְיַשֵּׂג וְיִרְמֹס לָאָרֶץ חַיָּ
content:
Psalms 7:5
LEB let the enemy of my soul pursue, and overtake and trample my life into the ground, and lay my honor in the dust. Selah
HB2 7:6 יִרַדֹּף אוֹיֵב נַפְשִׁי וְיַשֵּׂג וְיִרְמֹס לָאָרֶץ חַיָּי וּכְבוֹדִי לֶעָפָר יַשְׁכֵּן סֶלָה:

- even the hint play on words of tenting in dust
